readme_patterns: Lead with ONE sentence value prop (addyosmani: 'Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents')
Hero image/banner immediately after title (visual credibility)
Table of slash commands / capabilities (instant clarity on what you get)
Multi-platform install instructions in collapsible details (Cursor, Claude, Gemini, Codex)
Quick Start is FIRST actionable section (not buried)
Badge row for credibility (PyPI, license, Python version) — Microsoft pattern
News/updates section shows active maintenance (SkillOpt pattern)
description_patterns: Start with what it IS, not what it does: 'Production-grade engineering skills' > 'A tool that helps you...'
Include numbers: '150+ Skills', '259+ Skills', '1500+ skills', '90+ modules'
Name the platforms: 'for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI'
Include the install method in description if short enough
naming_patterns: Keyword-rich for search: include 'skill', 'agent', 'cursor', 'claude' in name when relevant
structure_patterns: Multi-skill repos (collections) get MORE stars than single skills
Awesome-list format (curated collections) dominates the 10K+ star tier
Single-purpose deep skills (SkillOpt, planning-with-files) can hit 1-5K with novel approach
Cross-platform compatibility (works in Cursor AND Claude AND Codex) multiplies reach
Having a project page / demo video / paper adds massive credibility (SkillOpt pattern)
marketing_patterns: Security/offensive skills get VERY high stars (raptor: 2.8K, Claude-Red: 1.9K, Claude-OSINT: 1.6K)
Science/domain-specific with clear authority gets stars (K-Dense-AI: 27K)
Meta-skills (skill creators, skill optimizers) get high engagement (FrancyJGLisboa: 1.3K, microsoft/SkillOpt: 4.6K)
Aggregators/awesome-lists are the highest-star category (49K-146K) but require massive curation effort
Niche but DEEP > broad but shallow for single-skill repos

top_repos_analyzed.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
top_repos_analyzed.key_insight: Lifecycle-mapped slash commands + production framing. 'Senior engineers use these' creates authority.

top_repos_analyzed.name: microsoft/SkillOpt
top_repos_analyzed.key_insight: Treats skill.md as TRAINABLE STATE. Paper-backed. pip installable. The meta-skill approach (improving skills themselves) is novel and high-value.

top_repos_analyzed.name: anthropics/skills
top_repos_analyzed.key_insight: Official platform repo. Being 'the canonical source' is the ultimate moat.

top_repos_analyzed.name: K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills
top_repos_analyzed.key_insight: Deep domain expertise + large number (140 skills, 100+ databases). Authority in a niche beats generic breadth.
